name: Provider Escape Hatch
summary: Framework-free provider contract for describing external API capabilities, validating outbound URLs, and redacting sensitive response data.

source.notes: Extracted from Analytics provider API request patterns. Keeps the contract, SSRF checks, and redaction boundaries without app bindings.

caveats: Credential resolution remains an interface; concrete secret storage stays app-local.
URL validation is hostname and private-network based, not a full outbound proxy policy.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when the target integration already has a narrower typed SDK that makes direct HTTP escape hatches unnecessary.
Do not use when outbound requests need browser-only APIs or streaming bodies not covered by this contract.
